title: SKT's Better Clear Glass
body:
![BCG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/18036420b41554c27a12049dfa04da7b672b4a6f.jpeg)

### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp)

### 📖⠄Description

Make Minecraft vanilla Glass textures looks clearer.

### 🔢⠄Variant

### ![V1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d414bc226bbf0c1ed5975dc15849a13e6f17813c.jpeg)
**1. Vanilla.** Doesn't require Optifine/Continuity.

### ![V2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/880aceb66fc06fea3b6f6c4a1dfd764a5d3cea9a.jpeg)
**2. Vanilla Connected Glass.** Doesn't require Optifine/Continuity.

⚠️ Kinda Buggy. models by [sniffercraft34](https://modrinth.com/user/sniffercraft34)

### ![V3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5cafd012f761a661e8220e7650e94dd66a5bcd6.jpeg)
**3. Connected Textures Mods(CTM).** Require [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) / [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity/).

### ![V4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e3f2dc973e9160e062618cf3c8d00f6b158c4a9.jpeg)
**4. No Border.** Doesn't require Optifine/Continuity.

### ![Batas](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e5c65545eff131020a7c59230e82c1ce6d9540d2_0.webp)
